descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-2 to win Centennial Cup championship on May 9, 1987.
descriptionLong: Jason Phillips scored three goals as the Richmond Sockeyes won the Centennial Cup junior-A championship with a 5-2 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on May 9, 1987. Goaltender Frank Romeo was named MVP of the four-team series after stopping 46 shots. Paul Rutherford and Dave Tomlinson also scored for Richmond in the decisive third period.
